infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow 876 Nurses to access your camera to take profile photos and share images in chat.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow 876 Nurses to access your photo library to choose and share images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow 876 Nurses to save images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow 876 Nurses to access your location to support appointment features (e.g., clock in/out location and sharing location in chat).
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Allow 876 Nurses to access your contacts so you can share a contact through chat.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow 876 Nurses to use Face ID to help you sign in securely.
